brand_profile.writing_instruction: Use short sentences with one key idea per line. Lead with a clear benefit or outcome. Write in an active voice and avoid jargon or overly technical terms. The first line should pose a problem or question that the rest of the content answers. Avoid: 'innovative solutions', 'cutting-edge technology', 'revolutionizing the industry'.

product_knowledge.description: Chargebee is a billing and monetization platform that helps businesses manage their revenue and billing workflows. It provides a range of features, including billing automation, usage-based pricing, and revenue recognition, to help companies scale their financial operations. With Chargebee, businesses can launch and scale subscription models effortlessly, automate invoicing and billing processes, and gain insights into their revenue data. The platform also provides tools for customer retention, payment processing, and tax management, making it a comprehensive solution for businesses looking to streamline their financial operations.

features.name: Usage-based Pricing
features.description: Charge customers based on value delivered

features.name: Revenue Recognition
features.description: Recognize revenue accurately and be GAAP-compliant and audit-ready

features.name: CPQ
features.description: Turn complex deals into simple wins—with finance on your side

features.name: Retention
features.description: Predict churn, deflect cancellation attempts, and grow lifetime value

benefits: Launch and scale subscription models effortlessly

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.reasoning: With a feature_count of 6 and a pain_point_count of 5, a carousel is the best content_type to showcase Chargebee's capabilities. The proof_point_count of 3 provides sufficient social proof to support the narrative. Although the brand_tone is bold, the presence of has_strong_stat and has_customer_name allows for a more educational and insightful approach, making carousel the most suitable choice.

product_knowledge.tagline: The product development system for teams and agents
product_knowledge.description: Linear is a product development system designed for modern teams with AI workflows at its core. It helps teams plan and build products, reduces noise, and restores momentum to help teams ship with high velocity and focus. Linear is purpose-built for planning and building products, and it sets a new standard for product development. It is shaped by the practices and principles of world-class product teams and is powered by AI agents that work alongside humans.

features.name: Issue tracking
features.description: Linear allows teams to track issues and assign them to team members

features.name: Project planning
features.description: Linear enables teams to plan and navigate from idea to launch, aligning teams with product initiatives and strategic roadmaps

features.name: AI-powered agents
features.description: Linear's AI agents work alongside humans to build and deploy AI-powered workflows

features.name: Code review
features.description: Linear allows teams to review code changes at a glance with structural diffs for human and agent output

proof_points.text: Our speed is intense and Linear helps us be action biased
You just have to use it and you will see, you will just feel it

pain_points: Difficulty in tracking issues and projects
messaging_angles: Linear is the future of product development, available today

The presence of has_strong_stat and has_customer_name also supports the use of a carousel to provide visual anchors and customer testimonials.

product_knowledge.description: Lemon is a personalized health companion that helps users take meaningful actions toward better well-being by bringing together their health data, daily habits, preferences, and goals to create a simple, guided plan with actionable steps toward better health. It connects with favorite health apps and wearable devices to understand habits, routines, and goals, providing personalized insights and recommendations that fit into the user's lifestyle. Lemon learns from the user's activity and feedback, continuously adapting to make it the ultimate companion for their health journey.

features.name: Personalized Guidance
features.description: Lemon provides real-time personalized guidance based on the user's lifestyle and data

features.name: Data Connection
features.description: Lemon connects with favorite health apps and wearable devices to understand habits, routines, and goals

features.name: Actionable Recommendations
features.description: Lemon provides actionable recommendations that fit into the user's lifestyle, helping them make small, consistent changes that lead to lasting results

features.name: Adaptive Learning
features.description: Lemon learns from the user's activity and feedback, continuously adapting to make it the ultimate companion for their health journey

benefits: Take meaningful actions toward better well-being
Simplify health journey with one app that does it all
Make small, consistent changes that lead to lasting results

proof_points.text: Lemon is your personalized health companion
Lemon connects with your favorite health apps and wearable devices

pain_points: Difficulty taking action toward better health
Overwhelmed by multiple health apps and wearables
Struggling to make consistent changes that lead to lasting results
product_knowledge.target_customer: Anyone who wants to live healthier and longer

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Industry benchmarks suggest that carousels with 6-10 slides perform well on LinkedIn, especially for educational content.
content_brief.reasoning: With 3 pain points and 4 distinct features, a carousel is the best content type to showcase the product's capabilities. The minimal brand tone supports a straightforward, educational approach. The presence of 2 proof points and a strong stat also make a carousel a good fit, as it can effectively communicate the product's value proposition and highlight its key benefits. The lack of a customer name does not hinder this choice, as the focus is on educating the audience about the product's features and benefits.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Feeling overwhelmed by multiple health apps and wearables, making it difficult to take action toward better health
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Lemon helps users take meaningful actions toward better well-being
strategy_brief.proof_point: Lemon connects with your favorite health apps and wearable devices
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike other health apps that only track data, Lemon brings together health data, daily habits, preferences, and goals
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by highlighting the frustration of using multiple health apps

linkedin_content.hook: You take control of your health when you can see the full picture.
linkedin_content.body: Feeling overwhelmed by multiple health apps and wearables is a common problem. It makes it difficult to take action toward better health. Your daily routine is affected by the time you spend switching between apps. You waste time searching for the information you need. This leads to frustration and inaction. The data from your health apps and wearables is scattered. It's hard to make sense of it all when it's not in one place. This makes it difficult to identify patterns and trends. The lack of a clear view of your health data leads to missed opportunities. You can't make informed decisions about your well-being. This is a significant obstacle to achieving your health goals. Lemon helps you take meaningful actions toward better well-being. It connects with your favorite health apps and wearable devices. This allows you to see the full picture of your health. With Lemon, you can make sense of your health data. You can identify patterns and trends that inform your decisions. This leads to better health outcomes. Lemon simplifies your health routine by bringing all your data together. You can focus on taking action toward your health goals. This leads to a sense of control and confidence. The first step toward better well-being is taking control of your health data. Lemon can help you do this. Start your trial today to see the difference for yourself. Start your Lemon trial now to begin taking meaningful actions toward better well-being. You'll be able to see the full picture of your health and make informed decisions. This is the first step toward achieving your health goals.

Feeling overwhelmed by multiple health apps and wearables is a common problem. It makes it difficult to take action toward better health.
